title: Automatically link Contact in Deals and Project boards

posts.author: lukasbrzozo (Lukas Brzozowski)
posts.cookedHtml:
There must be something I’m not doing right, as I think the system has this option, I just can’t see it.

So, in CRM we get a Lead and comes to the board by form. Once the Lead is qualified, we create a Deal. But when in Deal, we are losing a link to contact. We cave to manually link it inside a Deal board.

Is there a way to do it automatically? And if there is, why is it so complicated to find it?

Help please

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: How are you currently creating your deal? Can you screenshot?
